If not satisfied with the purchase, renewed products are eligible for replacement or refund under the Amazon Renewed Guarantee.']

Treated with a stain-resistant finish, this versatile 2 in 1 features subtly rounded edges designed to feel comfortable in your hands, and a 360-degree hinge engineered to provide stability as you transition from tablet to laptop mode and back.Though the Yoga 6 sports a compact 13.3 inch display, it brings big FHD visuals with razor-thin borders that give you as much screen space as possible with a dazzling spectrum of color. Whether you’re watching the latest movie or doing some casual gaming, see it all in extraordinarily smooth detail with built-in AMD Radeon graphics. Plus, enjoy powerfully immersive audio with Dolby Atmos -optimized stereo speakers.'

That product is inspected and tested to work and look like new by Amazon-qualified suppliers. Then, the product is sold as an Amazon Renewed product on Amazon. If not satisfied with the purchase, renewed products are eligible for replacement or refund under the Amazon Renewed Guarantee.']

 'This computer is sold with 8GB RAM and 512GB SSD configuration.This computer is listed above with no modifications, and the item will be unopened, in its original manufacturer box and untested. The Yoga 6 2 in 1 laptop features a fabric-wrapped cover in unique Abyss Blue. Treated with a stain-resistant finish, this versatile 2 in 1 features subtly rounded edges designed to feel comfortable in your hands, and a 360-degree hinge engineered to provide stability as you transition from tablet to laptop mode and back.Though the Yoga 6 sports a compact 13.3 inch display, it brings big FHD visuals with razor-thin borders that give you as much screen space as possible with a dazzling spectrum of color. Whether you’re watching the latest movie or doing some casual gaming, see it all in extraordinarily smooth detail with built-in AMD Radeon graphics. Plus, enjoy powerfully immersive audio with Dolby Atmos -optimized stereo speakers.'
